title: Hermes Agent + Mixture of Agents is insane…
summary: David Ondrej discusses using Hermes Agent combined with Mixture of Agents. The video title emphasizes the effectiveness of this combination for running AI agents.
writeup: David Ondrej walks through pairing Hermes Agent with a Mixture of Agents setup for running AI agents. The combination targets multi-agent workflows, where several agents coordinate rather than relying on a single model. The takeaway is that the two approaches together form the core method the video presents for agent execution.
